parameters.content:
### New Lead Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Company, Score). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Segment Audience

### Segment Audience

Two-way gate on `={{ ($json.score ?? 50) >= 50 }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Step 1 — Welcome (Outlook) · ②→ Tag for Slow Nurture

### Step 1 — Welcome (Outlook)

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Wait Before Step 2

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Tag for Slow Nurture

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Wait Before Step 2

Pauses 1 days — spacing calls to respect rate limits.

Next: Converted Already?

### Converted Already?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.status }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Step 2 — Value Nudge (Outlook) · ②→ Mark Converted — Stop Drip

### Step 2 — Value Nudge (Outlook)

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Update Drip Status

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Mark Converted — Stop Drip

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Update Drip Status

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

# Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Outlook with instant alerts

**Pattern:** Lead Capture & Routing · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Outlook with instant alerts. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual routing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Lead Form Submission → Segment Audience → Step 1 — Welcome (Outlook) → Wait Before Step 2 → Converted Already? → Step 2 — Value Nudge (Outlook) → Update Drip Status

## Use it for
- Teams that want to lead capture & routing without manual effort
- Anyone automating routing in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Responds in seconds
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: HubSpot private-app token; Microsoft OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your routing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
